product_overview: Pyautotest is a Python-based API automation framework that validates member authentication and CRM 2.0 lead management against remote staging environments. It covers login, lead lifecycle actions, activity recording, and shared reference data lookups.
core_goals: Validate member login and token issuance for downstream CRM access
Verify CRM lead creation, querying, claiming, assigning, and public sea movement
Confirm activity records can be created using a valid lead relationId
Provide reference data endpoints for country and user selection in lead workflows
Ensure all CRM endpoints are exercised with required authentication headers and expected success/error handling

features.name: Member Authentication API
features.description: Authenticates a member using account credentials and returns the token, memberId, and userId required for CRM API calls.
user_flows: POST /api/member/login with valid account and encrypted password -> Receive 200 with code and token, memberId, userId -> Use returned token, memberId, and userId in subsequent CRM API requests
POST /api/member/login with invalid account or password -> Receive non-200 or response without valid token -> Stop downstream CRM calls because authentication failed

features.name: CRM Lead Management API
features.description: Creates, queries, claims, assigns, and moves sales leads within the CRM 2.0 platform.
user_flows: POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> POST /api/crm/lead/saveOrUpdate with lead data and auth headers -> Receive 200 with code 1000 and lead data -> POST /api/crm/lead/page with phone or name and auth headers -> Receive 200 with matching lead records

POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> POST /api/crm/lead/claimLead with leadIds and auth headers -> Receive 200 with code 1000 -> POST /api/crm/lead/assign with leadIds, newFollowUserId, and newFollowUserName -> Receive 200 with code 1000 -> POST /api/crm/lead/movePublicSea with leadIds, reason code, and remark -> Receive 200 with code 1000

POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> POST /api/crm/lead/page with missing phone and name filters -> Receive 200 with code and empty or unfiltered data set -> Handle no-match result without creating or modifying leads

POST /api/crm/lead/saveOrUpdate without required auth headers or with invalid payload -> Receive 401/403 or validation error response -> Do not proceed to lead query, claim, assign, or move operations

features.name: CRM Activity Record API
features.description: Creates or updates activity records linked to an existing lead using the lead relationId.
user_flows: POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> POST /api/crm/lead/saveOrUpdate with lead details -> Receive 200 with code 1000 and lead identifier -> POST /api/crm/common/activity/saveOrUpdate with activityTypeCode, activityRecordTypeCode, relationId, and activityContent -> Receive 200 with code 1000

POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> POST /api/crm/common/activity/saveOrUpdate with missing or invalid relationId -> Receive 400/422 or non-1000 error response -> Activity is not created because the lead reference is invalid

features.name: CRM Common Data API
features.description: Provides shared reference data needed by lead creation and assignment workflows, including country lists and effective user lists.
user_flows: POST /api/member/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token, memberId, userId -> GET /api/crm/common/country/list with auth headers -> Receive 200 with country data array -> GET /api/member/user/effective/list with auth headers -> Receive 200 with effective user list for assignment selection
GET /api/crm/common/country/list without valid token or required headers -> Receive 401/403 unauthorized response -> Country list is not returned, preventing countryCode selection in lead creation

features.name: Member Authentication API
features.description: Login via encrypted password to obtain token, memberId and userId for subsequent CRM API calls

endpoints.description: Authenticate user with account and encrypted password, returns token and user info

features.name: CRM Lead Management API
features.description: Create, query, claim, assign and move sales leads in CRM 2.0 platform

endpoints.description: Create or update a sales lead
Paginated query of sales leads by phone or name
Assign leads to a new follow-up user

features.name: CRM Activity Record API
features.description: Create activity records linked to sales leads

endpoints.description: Create or update an activity record for a lead

features.name: CRM Common Data API
features.description: Shared reference data endpoints used by lead creation flows

endpoints.description: List countries for lead countryCode resolution
List effective users for lead assignment

known_limitations.issue: This repository is a test automation framework, not a deployable backend service; APIs target remote staging hosts (test-auth.ysbpack.com, test-platform.ysbpack.com)
known_limitations.impact: Tests require valid credentials in .env and network access to external staging environment

known_limitations.issue: UI tests use Playwright against production/staging web malls and cannot run without browser credentials
known_limitations.impact: Frontend UI flows are excluded from backend API test scope

known_limitations.issue: Mobile tests require local Android device/emulator and Appium server
known_limitations.impact: Mobile monkey and exploration tests are not suitable for HTTP API-only testing
